name: Midnight Munchers
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Unsweetened Baking Chocolate (melted and cooled)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 13 x 9 inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the brown sugar and butter until smooth.
4. Blend in the vanilla extract and eggs; mix well until combined.
5. Sift flour into another measuring cup and level off.
6. Stir sifted flour, baking powder, and salt into the sugar-butter mixture.
7. Divide dough into two parts.
8. Stir melted chocolate into half of the dough.
9. Drop each portion of dough by large tablespoonfuls onto the prepared pan in a random pattern.
10. Spread the dough evenly with an offset spatula.
11. Bake for 17 to 22 minutes, or until golden brown and set on top.
12. Allow bars to cool completely.
13. Spread caramel frosting evenly over the cooled bars.
14. Freeze the bars for about 30 minutes.
15. In a small saucepan, combine sugar, butter, and milk.
16. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture boils gently.
17. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate chips until melted and smooth.
18. Pour topping evenly over the frozen bars.
19. Refrigerate for an additional 30 minutes to allow topping to set.
20. Cut into bars using a sharp knife.
Store in refrigerator. Makes 24 bars.
